title: High-Resolution Gundam Portrait
prompt: A close-up photo of the head and chest of a Gundam, with its iconic red, yellow, and white color scheme. The face is detailed in high resolution, capturing every line and texture. In the foreground stands an impressive Gundam model on display against a pure white background. Shot with a Canon EOS R5 at F2.8, ISO400, and a fast shutter speed, the composition highlights the power and beauty of the Gundam, showcasing the intricate details that bring out the futuristic design elements. --ar 3:4 --v 7
